title: Recorded Blender-MCP mutating calls violated the stateless saved-blend chaining contract
description: Remediate EXEC-BLENDER-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Before escalating a Blender-MCP defect, prove one correct chain: `project_initialize(output_blend=...)`, then a mutating follow-up that reuses the returned `persistence.saved_blend` as `input_blend`, and verify `.blender-mcp/audit/*.jsonl` records non-null `input_blend` / `output_blend` on the matching `job_start`.
summary: Before escalating a Blender-MCP defect, prove one correct chain: `project_initialize(output_blend=...)`, then a mutating follow-up that reuses the returned `persistence.saved_blend` as `input_blend`, and verify `.blender-mcp/audit/*.jsonl` records non-null `input_blend` / `output_blend` on the matching `job_start`.

title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

title: Remediation review artifact does not contain runnable command evidence
description: Remediate EXEC-REMED-001 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.
summary: For remediation tickets with `finding_source`, require the review artifact to record the exact command run, include raw command output, and state the explicit PASS/FAIL result before the review counts as trustworthy closure.

title: Repo claims ready or finished state, but the finish contract forbids placeholder output and finish-owning tickets are still open
description: Remediate FINISH002 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Either close or supersede the open finish tickets with real content proof, or update the restart narrative to stop claiming finished-product ready state until the finish bar is met.
summary: Either close or supersede the open finish tickets with real content proof, or update the restart narrative to stop claiming finished-product ready state until the finish bar is met.

title: Smoke-test proof can still be fabricated through generic artifact tools instead of the owning deterministic workflow tool
description: Remediate WFLOW005 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: Reserve smoke-test artifacts to `smoke_test`, and make the plugin plus transition guidance reject generic PASS-proof fabrication while keeping optional handoff artifacts consistent with docs-lane ownership.
summary: Reserve smoke-test artifacts to `smoke_test`, and make the plugin plus transition guidance reject generic PASS-proof fabrication while keeping optional handoff artifacts consistent with docs-lane ownership.

title: The repo requires Blender-MCP for its asset route but is missing mandatory Blender operating surfaces
description: Remediate SKILL003 by correcting the validated issue and rerunning the relevant quality checks.
suggested_fix_approach: When asset-pipeline metadata requires Blender-MCP, keep `asset-description`, `blender-mcp-workflow`, a dedicated `blender-asset-creator`, and the team leader's delegation allowlist in sync with the managed `blender_agent` MCP entry and the repo's asset/audit paths.
summary: When asset-pipeline metadata requires Blender-MCP, keep `asset-description`, `blender-mcp-workflow`, a dedicated `blender-asset-creator`, and the team leader's delegation allowlist in sync with the managed `blender_agent` MCP entry and the repo's asset/audit paths.
